commentaries.author: Cyprian of Carthage
commentaries.content: And he took me in the Spirit to a great mountain, and he showed me the holy city Jerusalem descending out of heaven from God, having the glory of God."

commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: I will show thee the bride, the wife of the Lamb: all the Church triumphant in heaven. (Witham)
